body: Initial assessment: device firmware may be outdated. Scheduling remote update.
Customer confirmed WiFi credentials are correct. Router is 2.4GHz compatible.
Dispatching field technician to verify CT clamp installation on main panel.
Firmware updated to 2.2.0 remotely. Device now connecting successfully.
CT clamps were installed on wrong phase. Recalibrated and readings now normal.
Reviewing contract terms and invoice generation logic. Escalating to billing team.
Known issue with firmware 2.1.0 schedule persistence. Fix available in 2.2.0.
Credit note issued for difference. Next invoice will reflect correct amount.
Firmware 2.2.0 pushed to device. Customer confirmed schedule now persists.
Signal strength test shows -78 dBm. Recommending WiFi extender near meter location.
Scheduling site survey for warehouse meter installation. Estimated 2 weeks.
Support requested logs and suggested reboot plus firmware confirmation.
